empty.title: No recent documents
empty.message: Scan documents by tapping the button below

home.document_max_size_error: Pages count shouldn't be more than 5

chat.title: Document сhat
chat.no_readable_text_message: Document contains no readable text. Please try again with a clearer image.
chat.error_message: Request failed. Please check your internet connection and make sure your API key is set up correctly, then try again.
chat.intro_message:
Ask a question about this document. 

For example:
- What is this document about?
- Can you summarize the key points? 

Note: don't use this chat for documents with confidential personal data.

setup_required.title: AI is not configured
setup_required.subtitle: Connect provider and API key in settings

leave_chat_bottom_sheet.title: Leave chat?
leave_chat_bottom_sheet.subtitle: The chat history will not be saved after you exit

settings.title: Settings
settings.api_key_note: Your key is stored securely on this device.
settings.connection_error_message: Connection failed. Please verify your API key and check if your usage limit has been exceeded.

provider_instructions.title: How to get API key
provider_instructions.step1: 1. Sign in or create an account at
provider_instructions.step2: 2. Create a new API key and paste it below

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.accept_checkbox: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy

section_1.title: 1. Data Collection
section_1.text: We do not intentionally collect or store personal data on external servers. All documents are stored locally on your device unless you explicitly share them.

section_2.title: 2. Camera and Storage
section_2.text: The app uses camera and gallery access only for scanning and importing documents.

section_3.title: 3. AI Processing
section_3.text: Some features use AI services to analyze text extracted from documents. Only selected content is sent for processing.

section_4.title: 4. Consent
section_4.text: By continuing, you agree to the processing of document content for OCR and AI analysis.
